name: Nanci's Birthday Cake
recipeIngredient: Frosting: 8 ounces Cream cheese (regular or lite), 1/4 pound softened butter, 1 box powdered sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla
recipeInstructions: Mix dry ingredients. Add wet ingredients - coffee last (be careful when adding coffee; set mixer to low to prevent splashing). Mix well. Pour into a 9 x 13 pan and bake for 25-35 minutes.
